50.reason: [The traversal logic in 'visit' is incorrect: it only prints a node as a leaf if the left child is NULL and then checks the right. However, if a node has only a right child, it will incorrectly treat it as a leaf when it shouldn't. Also, if a node has only a left child, it recurses left but never checks if that left child is a leaf correctly in all cases. The correct approach is to check if both children are NULL to identify a leaf.]
